zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John la Zouche於1357年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche16歲，母親Lady Agnes de Grene16歲。他於1399年11月之前與Margaret de Burgh結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布爾維其可享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John la Zouche于1357年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche16岁，母亲Lady Agnes de Grene16岁。他于1399年11月之前与Margaret de Burgh结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年9月9日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布爾維其可享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John la Zouche was born in 1357, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, was 16 and his mother, Lady Agnes de Grene, was 16. He married Margaret de Burgh before November 1399. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1445, in Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John la Zouche est né en 1357, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes de Grene, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Burgh avant novembre 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1445, à Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John la Zouche 1357 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche 16 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes de Grene 16. Er hat vor November 1399 Margaret de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1445 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John la Zouche è nato il nel 1357 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes de Grene, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Burgh prima del novembre 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1445, nel Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John la Zoucheが1357年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zoucheは16歳，母Lady Agnes de Greneは16歳であった。1399年11月以前にMargaret de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブルウィックで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John la Zouche(이)가 1357년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes de Grene(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1399년 11월 이전 Margaret de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 버윅에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John la Zouche nasceu em 1357, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes de Grene, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Burgh antes novembro de 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1445, em Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John la Zouche родился в 1357 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes de Grene, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Burgh перед ноябрь 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1445 г. в местности булвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John la Zouche nació en 1357, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes de Grene, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margaret de Burgh antes de noviembre de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1445, en Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años.
